title: nasturtium indicum
intro: Nasturtium indicum, also known as Indian cress or watercress, is an annual herb belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of nasturtium indicum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, nasturtium indicum is often used in teas, infusions, and salves, and its leaves can be eaten raw or cooked as a vegetable, adding a peppery flavor to salads and other dishes.
